title: Taking the Elevator
content: Every morning, Sophie takes the elevator down from the tenth floor of her apartment building. Usually, the ride is quiet and quick. One morning, however, the elevator suddenly stopped between floors for a few minutes. Sophie felt nervous and pressed the emergency button immediately. Another person inside the elevator tried to stay calm and started a friendly conversation to pass the time. Soon, a maintenance worker fixed the problem and the elevator moved again. Sophie arrived at work safely, but she still preferred using the stairs sometimes afterward.
